EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Thick Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Thin Client mode on host {event_src.host}
A user authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Thick Client mode on host {event_src.host}
A user authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Thin Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Web Client mode on host {event_src.host}
A user authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Web Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} authenticated using OpenID when logging in to Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
